title: Battle of Yavin 4 (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several battles taking place on or around [[Yavin 4]] ([[canon]] and [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]) throughout galactic history, including the following:

==Canon==
===Galactic Civil War===
*'''[[Battle of Yavin]]''', the battle that saw the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]].
*'''[[Evacuation of Yavin 4]]''', the evacuation of the [[Massassi Temple (disambiguation)|Massassi Temple]] following the Battle of Yavin 4

==Legends==
===Great Sith War===
*The '''[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|final battle]]''' of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]

===Great Galactic War===
*A '''[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Galactic War)|battle]]''' during the [[Great Galactic War]]

===Galactic War===
*A '''[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Galactic War)|battle]]''' during the [[Galactic War]]

===Clone Wars===
*A '''[[Duel on Yavin 4|duel]]''' during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]

===Galactic Civil War===
*The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] '''[[Raid on Yavin 4|raid]]''' in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]
*The '''[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]''' that saw the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]
*The six-month '''[[Yavin blockade]]'''
*The '''[[Space Battle at Yavin 4]]''' conducted by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] to search the Death Star's wreckage.
*An '''[[Rescue mission on Yavin 4|Imperial rescue mission]]''' for survivors of the Battle of Yavin
*An '''[[Attack on Yavin 4|attack]]''' on the Rebel forces there
*A later '''[[Strike on Yavin 4|attack]]''' by the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]].
*The '''[[evacuation of Yavin]]'''
*'''[[Plan Number Two]]''' in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]
*The '''[[Assault on Yavin 4]]''' in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]
**A '''[[Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)|battle]]''' involving the [[Empire Reborn]]

===Second Imperium crisis===
*The '''[[Third Battle of Yavin]]''' in [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]]

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
*The '''[[Invasion of Yavin 4]]''' in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
